title: Home Screen - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog not displayed over DFU screens when new device connected during active firmware update
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that supports onboarding (e.g., Voyager Free 60, Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 20) that has a pending firmware update.
3. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the connected device.
4. While the DFU is in progress, connect a second device that also supports onboarding (e.g., another Voyager Free 60).
5. Wait for the DFU to complete.
6. Observe the Home screen after the DFU completes.
expected: After the DFU completes and the user returns to the Home screen, the onboarding dialog for the newly connected device should be displayed.
